title: Environmental assessment and evidence: Southern North Sea demersal non-quota species fisheries management plan (FMP)
body: "The strategic environmental assessment (SEA) evaluates the potential positive and negative environmental effects of the proposed policies in the Southern North Sea demersal non-quota species fisheries management plan (FMP).   This environmental report sets out the findings of the SEA.   You can also read the non-technical summary of the report.   Read more about fisheries management plans.  "
